site.name: Danial Khalili
site.title: Danial Khalili | Portfolio
site.description: A portfolio focused on building thoughtful digital products, systems, and tools across web, AI, geospatial, and IoT work.

hero.headline: Building digital products with clarity, structure, and a strong eye for interaction.
hero.supportingText: This portfolio is a quieter, sharper presentation of selected work across geospatial platforms, AI products, resilience systems, and IoT experiments.

projectsIntro.title: Projects that hold up both visually and technically.
projectsIntro.body: Each project should feel like a polished product surface backed by a clear story: what mattered, what was built, and why the result is interesting.

approach.title: I care about the structure behind the surface.
approach.body: The projects here are not just screenshots or feature lists. They are examples of how I think through systems, shape interfaces, and make technically complex work feel usable.

principles.title: Design with intent
principles.body: Interfaces should feel deliberate, not generic.

principles.title: Build the whole thing
principles.body: I enjoy connecting frontend, backend, and product logic into one cohesive system.

principles.title: Keep complexity legible
principles.body: The best systems handle depth without becoming confusing.

about.title: Product-minded engineer with a systems view.
about.body: My work sits between software engineering, digital product building, and interaction design. I like projects that require both technical depth and editorial judgment.

contact.title: Let's build something thoughtful.
contact.body: If you are working on a product, platform, or tool that needs strong implementation and a clear design sense, I'd be happy to connect.

footer.note: Built with plain HTML, CSS, and TypeScript.
